title: MegaBlocked : Unofficial Remake
description: Remake of the Mega Block Boss from Sthullen's Bosscraft Mod.
body:
Remake of a Boss I loved from Sthullen's Bosscraft (especially the 1.6.4 version). 

This mod also includes the Creepy Block mob found in the Stony Peaks, Stony Shore, Windswept Hills and Windswept Gravelly Hills. Aswell as the drops of the Mega block and creepy block. With the Item and crafting recipe to summon the boss being in the gallery tab.

The Hard Mode is very challenging; attempt it at your own peril.

Original Mod 🔗: https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1282120-1-3-2-bosscraft-v1-5-bosses-weapons-more-updated
